message:
chore: add ephemeral file patterns to .gitignore

Add ci-artifacts/, proptest-regressions/, test_meminfo, storage.sqlite3*,
and perf.data patterns to prevent accidental commits of agent-generated
build artifacts, property test regressions, and benchmark detritus.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -57,3 +57,8 @@ rustc-ice-*.txt
 
 # Ephemeral agent flag/lock files
 Safe
+
+# Ephemeral files (agent-generated, build artifacts, test detritus)
+ci-artifacts/
+proptest-regressions/
+test_meminfo
